reasoning: After reviewing the Comments History section, I found a critical FRAUD ALERT note dated Jan 14, 2026. The internal staff note indicates: 1) Customer has 9 refunds in 35 days, 2) ALL previous claims were 'item not received' but tracking confirmed delivery for every order, 3) Total already refunded: $1,588.19, 4) Refund rate: 82%, 5) Explicit instruction to 'DO NOT PROCESS - Escalate to Loss Prevention immediately.' The current claim of 'Package was crushed in shipping' represents a pattern shift from previous 'item not received' claims, which may indicate awareness that the previous excuse is flagged. This request must be escalated to Loss Prevention as directed by the existing fraud alert, not approved or denied at the customer service level.
